option_labels: Provide — supply the list of currently shipping screens so website onboarding copy can be rewritten to match
Defer — keep current onboarding descriptions as-is until the product stabilizes
context: From ra_agent_roundtable_daily_adversarial_2026_03_21: 3 of 5 onboarding steps on the website reference non-existent product screens. The roundtable flagged this but did not provide specific replacement wording or a list of which screens currently ship. This is a public-facing claims change that requires human input on what the product actually shows today.
